.: The Next Level 3600 is a unisex cotton crew tee crafted with a light fabric (4.3 oz/yd² (146 g/m²)), making it an excellent all-season staple.
.: Fabric blends: Heather colors - 90% cotton, 10% polyester
.: The classic fit along with the crew neckline provide a timeless style with neat looks that are perfect for accessorizing. This means it’s a highly versatile choice for both casual and semi-formal events.

column3:
The Gildan Softstyle® 64000 redefines casual comfort with a modern unisex cut and ultra-soft materials. Solid colors are 100% cotton, while heathers and sport grey use polyester blends for added durability. Shoulders are reinforced with twill tape, there are no side seams for a smoother fit, and the ribbed-knit collar helps prevent curling. Whether for printing or everyday wear, the Gildan 64000 stands out as a dependable wardrobe staple.

Disclaimer:
- Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white.
- Sleeve prints and neck labels are produced using DTF (Direct-to-Film) printing technology. This applies only to products fulfilled by the print providers OPT OnDemand and Shirt Monkey among the providers offering this item.


.: Made with 100% ring-spun cotton, the Gildan 64000 from the Gildan Softstyle® collection is a lightweight fabric (4.5 oz/yd² (153 g/m²)) that feels blissful to wear all year round.
.: The classic fit with the crew neckline deliver a clean, versatile style that can match any occasion, whether it's formal or semi-formal.
.: All shirts feature a pearlized, tear-away label for total wearing comfort.
.: Made using ethically grown and harvested US cotton. Gildan is also a proud member of the US Cotton Trust Protocol ensuring ethical and sustainable means of production. This blank tee is certified by Oeko-Tex for safety and quality assurance.
.: Fabric blends: Heather colors - 35% ring-spun cotton, 65% polyester; Sport Grey and Antique colors - 90% cotton, 10% polyester, Graphite Heather - 50% ring-spun cotton, 50% polyester



EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY

Product information: Gildan 64000, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC

Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Made in Bangladesh

Care instructions: Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), with similar colors , Do not bleach, Tumble dry: low heat, Iron, steam or dry: low heat, Do not dryclean

column3:
Embrace the perfect blend of comfort and functionality with these versatile tees, designed to move seamlessly with you during swimming or any water activity. Engineered to tackle UV rays and moisture, they offer a breathable and quick-dry experience that keeps up with your active lifestyle. Plus, the innovative PosiCharge technology ensures that colors and logos remain vibrant over time.

Crafted from a flexible 5.9-ounce fabric, consisting of 90% polyester and 10% spandex, these stretch jersey tees boast a UPF rating of 50. The trim, comfortable fit is enhanced by a tag-free label, offering irritation-free wear. Featuring raglan sleeves and underarm gussets, these tees promise a range of motion as you dive into your favorite activities.


.: 5.9-ounce, 90/10 poly/spandex stretch jersey
.: PosiCharge color-lock technology
.: UPF 50 protection
.: Breathable and quick-dry
.: Trim, comfortable fit
.: Tag-free label
.: Raglan sleeves
.: Underarm gussets.
.: Please note: This product is shipped only to the United States and their territories.

column2: Koala Kangaroo Premium Graphic Tee ,''The Suplex Fashion''
column3:
Turn heads and make a bold statement with the Koala Kangaroo Premium Graphic Tee, where streetwear meets strength and attitude. Designed for those who move with confidence, this piece blends wild Australian energy with a modern, edgy fashion style.

Why You’ll Love It:

Premium heavyweight fabric (6 oz+) – thick, durable, and long-lasting

High-quality graphic print – bold design that won’t fade

Comfortable fit – perfect for everyday wear

Streetwear style – clean and trendy look

Unisex design – suitable for both men and women

The Concept:

Inspired by power and dominance, “The Suplex Fashion” represents strength, resilience, and fearless expression. This is more than just a T-shirt,it’s a statement.

Perfect For:

Streetwear outfits

Gym and fitness wear

Casual daily styling

Anyone who wants to stand out

Product Details:

Material: 100% premium cotton

Fit: Regular / slightly oversized feel

Print: Durable, long-lasting graphic

Care: Machine wash cold, wash inside-out

Style Tip:

Pair it with joggers, cargos, or shorts for a clean streetwear look.

Upgrade your style with confidence, get yours now.

column2: The Gumtree Dojo Long Sleeve Rashguard (Green Edition)
column3:
Heritage meets performance. Built for the modern grappler.

The Gumtree Dojo Rashguard blends traditional identity with elite performance design. Featuring a bold Australian-inspired artwork, this piece represents strength, culture, and dominance on the mats.

Crafted for serious athletes, it delivers a perfect balance of comfort, durability, and standout style.

Why this piece stands out:

  • Premium compression fit for maximum performance
  • Breathable, sweat-wicking fabric
  • Long sleeve protection for intense training
  • High-definition sublimation print (no fading or cracking)
  • Reinforced stitching for durability

Whether you're training or competing, this rashguard keeps you sharp, confident, and Koalafied. 

Care Instructions: Moisture-wicking, 4-way stretch, and machine washable (hand dry recommended).
